raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht ka tee weenu ta Praveeta Jeremijus A
Gekkibu darrija eekſch Israëta/
sim laſtis.
un to Laulibu pahrlausija ar fa-
wo Tuwafu Seewahm/un run-
naja Mellu Wahrdus eekſch
mannu Wahrdä/ ko es teem ne
biju pawehlejs/un es efmu tas/
kas to finna/ un weens Leezi-
neeks/ ſakka tas KUNGS:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un prett Semaju to Ne-
kalamiteri runna/ un ſakki ?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta runna tas KUNGS
Zebaot/ tas Israëta Deews/ un
ſakka : Tadeht ka tu effi Grah-
matas fuhtijs tawä Wahrdä ue
wiſſeem Laudiu/ kas Jerufale-
mê irr/ un uhs Zewaniju Mase-
jus Dehlu/ to Preesteri/ un uhs
wiſſeem Preestereem/ un ſazztig:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS effu te-
wi par Preesterti lizzis ta Bree-
steru Jojadus Weetä/ ka jums
buhs usranggeim buht eekſch ta
KUNGA Namma pahr ikkatru
Wihru/ kastrakko/un ſewi par
Praweetu turrahs/ ka tew to
Zeetumu un Seekſä buhs likt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu tad/ kapehz ne effi tn
Jeremiju to Anatotiteri aprah-
jis/ kas juhsu Starpä par Pra-
weetu turrahs?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tavehz irr wiꞥſch pee
mums ue Babeli fuhtijs/ un
fazztigs : Tas buhs ilgam/ ustai-
fajt Nammus / un dfihwojeet
(eekſch teem / ) un dehſtajt
Dahrsus/ un ehdeet winnu Aug-
tus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Zewanijus tas Bree-
ſeris bij scho Grahmata preekſch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz notikke ta RU-
GA Wahrdä us Jeremiju/
fazztia:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Suhti jelle uhs wiſſee
Aiswesteeni/ un ſakki: Ta ſa-
tas KUNGS prett Semaju
Nekalamiteri : Tapehz ka S
majus jums irr fluddinajs /
es to ne efmu fuhttije/ un irr da-
rijs/ ka juhs uhs Melleein p-
laischatees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz ſakka tas KUN-
ta: Raugi/ Es peimekietchu S-
majn to Nekalamiteri/ un wi-
na Dsimmunu/ wiſſam ne pe-
derrehs neuweens/ kas fcho La-
schu Widdu dsibwohs/ un ne-
dſehs to Labbumu/ ko es ma-
neim Laudim darrſchu / ſak-
tas KUNGS: Jo tas irr we-
nu Atkahpfchanu mahztijs pre-
to KUNGU-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Chis irr tas Wahrd-
fas notikke uhs Jerem-
ju no ta KUNGA/ ſaz-
zija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta runna tas KUNGS-
tas Israëta Deews/ un ſak-
Rakſti few wiſſis schohs Wah-
dus/ ko es uhs tewi runnajs
nu/ weena Grahmata.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
